name: MIND TECHNOLOGY, INC
summary: MIND Technology, Inc. designs, manufactures, and sells specialized marine seismic and oceanographic equipment through its Seamap Marine Products business. Key products include GunLink seismic source acquisition and control systems, BuoyLink RGNSS positioning systems, Sleeve Gun energy sources, and SeaLink towed seismic streamer systems. The company serves marine survey companies, seismic contractors, research institutes, and governmental organizations globally, with operations in the United States, Singapore, Malaysia, and the United Kingdom.

products.name: GunLink
products.description: Seismic source acquisition and control system providing precise monitoring and control of marine seismic energy sources.

products.name: BuoyLink RGNSS
products.description: Relative global navigation satellite system used for precise positioning of marine seismic energy sources and streamers.

products.name: SeaLink
products.description: Towed seismic streamer system including marine sensors and solid streamer systems for oceanographic and hydrographic surveys.

products.name: Sleeve Gun
products.description: Marine seismic energy source used in marine seismic survey operations.

products.name: Spectral Ai
products.description: Data handling and automatic target recognition (ATR) software system designed for Klein side scan sonar systems.

products.name: Streamer weight collars, depth transducers, pressure transducers, air control valves, source array systems
products.description: Ancillary products supporting Seamap's primary marine seismic product lines.

partnerships.description: Licensing and collaboration agreement for Spectral Ai ATR software following sale of Klein Marine Systems to General Oceans AS.
